productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men Rugged Sail Navy Blue Shoes
description: Designed for those who love those healthy runs, the adidas Rugged Sail combines lightweight breathable comfort and flexibility that makes running all the more pleasurable.UpperSynthetic upper for durability and comfortStrategically placed overlays and stitched detailing for added shoe structureadidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and meshed tongue for snug fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortBranding on the tongue and at the back of the collarPull tag at the collarMidsoleRubber midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleBranching grooves on the outsoleShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
